programs.title: Masters Of Flip
programs.desc: Kortney and Dave tackle a massive flip that requires a large bump out and a possible second building. As Kortney works with her team on a bright and airy design plan, Dave does everything in his power to scale down the size of the project.

programs.title: Small Town Potential
programs.desc: A chef and his wife look to put down roots near family in the Hudson Valley and want a home with a great kitchen and room to grow. Davina and Kristin are challenged with a modest budget and tight spaces to deliver a house that's both fun and functional.

programs.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programs.desc: In the season finale, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt bring back all their teammates to help tackle the hotel exteriors. Also, the Scott Brothers have help judging as they decide who takes home the bragging rights and the $50,000 charity prize!

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Blue Toes and Shower Woes in Avon, North Carolina
programs.desc: After discovering Avon, North Carolina during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper. Once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck.

programs.title: Flip or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina believe they have a lead on an easy house to flip in Rowland Heights, California, but once they get inside, they find a lot of problems that will test their skills.

programs.title: Flip or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, California. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.
